prompt:
You are an expert industrial quality control analyst.
I will provide you with descriptions of 10 NORMAL (defect-free) object samples.

Your task is to identify the strict INVARIANTS — the characteristics that are completely identical and required across ALL normal samples.

[Descriptions of Normal Samples]
[ Normal object Description 1 ]
1. Components: 
   - Two washers
   - One long screw (threaded rod)
   - One short screw

2. Quantities:
   - Exactly two washers
   - Exactly one long screw
   - Exactly one short screw
   
3. Spatial Arrangement:
   - Washers and screws must be located on the left side of the bag.
   
4. Visual Appearance:
   - The components are metallic with a silver color.

< Additional Constraints for this Screw Bag >
- All bolts (screws) should have threads visible, indicating they can be turned or tightened easily by hand tools like wrenches or screwdrivers without requiring additional power tools such as drills to start threading them into materials due to their length being longer than 3 times diameter of washer which would make it difficult manually if not properly designed in terms of thread pitch etc

[ Normal object Description 2 ]
1. Components: 
   - Two washers
   - One long screw (threaded)
   - One short screw (threaded)

2. Quantities:
   - Exactly two washers

3. Spatial Arrangement:
   - Washers and screws must be located on the left side of the bag.

4. Visual Appearance:
   - The components are metallic.
   - The washers have a circular shape with an inner hole, while the nuts also have a hexagonal head but no central hole for threading through them directly like washers do; they only fit onto threaded fasteners to hold things together securely without slipping off or rotating around it during use due to their larger diameter compared than that of other parts involved in this assembly process such as bolts etc., which would require additional support from another component within system design structure itself rather just relying solely upon frictional forces between surfaces contacting each other when placed inside container packaging materials used here instead!

[ Normal object Description 3 ]
1. Components: [Three washers, two nuts, one long screw, and one short screw]
2. Quantities: [Exactly three washers, exactly two nuts, one long screw, and one short screw]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [All components are located on the right side of the bag]
4. Visual Appearance: [The screws have a metallic finish; all items appear to be made from metal]

[ Normal object Description 4 ]
1. Components: [Two washers, two nuts, one long screw, and one short screw]
2. Quantities: [Exactly four washers (two of each type), exactly two nuts (one of each type), one long screw, and one short screw]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [All items must be located on the left side within a clear plastic bag with printed recycling symbols along its right edge]
4. Visual Appearance: [The screws are metallic; the washers have hexagonal heads]

[ Normal object Description 5 ]
1. Components: 
   - Two washers
   - Two nuts (one larger and one smaller)
   - One long screw
   - One short screw

2. Quantities:
   - Exactly two washers, with the large washer on top of the small washer.
   - Exactly four nuts in total.

3. Spatial Arrangement:
   - The components are located only within a transparent plastic bag that is sealed at all edges except for an opening where they can be accessed or removed by hand without damaging them from inside outwards.

4. Visual Appearance:
   - The screws have hexagonal heads; both appear to be metallic silver-colored.
   - The washers also seem metallic but slightly darker than the screws due to their material properties.
   - The background color of the packaging appears black which contrasts well against the metallic parts making it easier to see each component clearly.


< Additional Constraints >
- All bolts (screws) must not exceed 10 cm length as per standard sizes used commonly across various applications ensuring ease of handling during installation processes while maintaining structural integrity when tightened properly onto corresponding threaded holes/holes provided specifically designed for such purposes like those found typically seen around doors hinges etc., especially important considering safety standards required nowadays!

[ Normal object Description 6 ]
1. Components: [One long screw, two washers, one short screw]
2. Quantities: [Exactly three nuts (two small and one large)]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [All items must be located on the left side of the bag]
4. Visual Appearance: [The screws are silver-colored; the nuts have a hexagonal shape]

[ Normal object Description 7 ]
1. Components: 
   - Two washers
   - One long screw (threaded rod)
   - One short screw

2. Quantities:
   - Exactly two washers
   - Exactly one long screw
   - Exactly one short screw
   
3. Spatial Arrangement:
   - Washers and screws must be placed inside the bag.
   
4. Visual Appearance:
   - The components should not overlap each other excessively.

< Additional Constraints for a screw_bag >
- All bolts are longer than 3 times the diameter of the washer, ensuring proper assembly fitment when used in construction or mechanical applications.


In this image:

The contents appear to match these requirements with no visible overlaps that would hinder identification during use.

[ Normal object Description 8 ]
1. Components: Two washers, two nuts, one long screw (at least 3 times the diameter of a washer), and one short screw.
2. Quantities: Exactly four washers; exactly three nuts; at least five screws in total with specific lengths as described above.
3. Spatial Arrangement: Items must be located on both sides within the bag but not overlapping each other or outside its boundaries.
4. Visual Appearance: The items are metallic silver-colored against a black background inside the transparent plastic bag.

< Additional Constraints for this Screw Bag >
- Ensure that all components fit properly without any visible gaps between them to maintain structural integrity during transportation.

[ Normal object Description 9 ]
1. Components: 
   - Two washers
   - Three nuts (two small, one large)
   - One long screw

2. Quantities:
   - Exactly two washers
   - Exactly three nuts
   
3. Spatial Arrangement:
   - The components must be located inside the bag.
   
4. Visual Appearance:
   - The screws and nuts should have a metallic appearance with visible threading on the screws.

Note that this description is based solely on visual inspection of the image provided; it does not include any assumptions beyond what can be directly observed in the picture itself.

[ Normal object Description 10 ]
1. Components: [Two washers, two nuts, one long screw, and one short screw]
2. Quantities: [Exactly four washers (two each), exactly three nuts (one extra nut)]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [All components are located on the left side of the bag]
4. Visual Appearance: [The screws have a metallic finish; all items appear shiny]

[Normality Constraints Provided by Engineer]
- A screw bag contains two washers, two nuts, one long screw, and one short screw.
- All bolts (screws) are longer than 3 times the diameter of the washer.

Analyze the descriptions and extract the core logical rules.
Format your output exactly like this:
1. Components: [List the exact objects that must be present]
2. Quantities: [Exact numbers required, e.g., "exactly two washers"]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [Where items must be located, e.g., "only on the left side"]
4. Visual Appearance: [Specific colors, shapes, or orientations required]

Keep it concise, factual, and strictly based on the provided descriptions.
response:
1. Components: [Two washers, one long screw (threaded rod), and one short screw]
2. Quantities: [Exactly two washers; exactly one long screw; exactly one short screw]
3. Spatial Arrangement: [Washers and screws must be located on the left side of the bag or inside a transparent plastic bag that is sealed at all edges except for an opening where they can be accessed by hand without damaging them from inside outwards]
4. Visual Appearance: [The components are metallic with a silver color]
